Further classification within the family Orchidaceae would place Paraprasophyllum niphopedium within the subfamily Orchidoideae. The subfamily Orchidoideae is a diverse group of orchids that includes many species found in Australia. intro: Paraprasophyllum niphopedium, also known as the Snowy Paraprasophyllum, is a rare and endemic orchid species found in the mountainous regions of Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments, including respiratory issues and skin infections.
